name: Coconut Cake/Governor Nelson
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake according to package directions in a 9x12-inch pan.
2. When the cake is done, poke holes in it with a fork.
3. Pour the can of condensed milk and can of cream of coconut over the cake.
4. Let cool.
5. Spread whipped cream over the cake.
6. Sprinkle with flaked coconut.
